title: Custom Tabs (Custab)
description: Lets you create your own custom Creative Tabs!
body:
# Create your own Custom Creative Tabs!

This is it, the mod we all needed, even if we didn't know it - has arrived.

## How to use?

Well, it's easy! 

1. Open the Creative Inventory

2. You will see a + button in the upper left corner. Click it.

3. Enter the required parameters - and there you have it!

---

**Note:** Due to Fabric limitations, the new Tabs will not be added until you restart your game.

**Warning:**
This mod is currently in Early-ALPHA, and apart from not having all the features planned, it is also very unstable and may crash the game.
